message: Thanks for processing this so quickly. Could you clarify how the comparison group of 34 was selected? I'd like to understand whether tenure was factored in.
Hi Alice — good question. The comparison group included Senior Engineers in the US with 3-7 years of tenure at the company. Let me know if you'd like us to rerun with a wider tenure band.
That makes sense — tenure band is appropriate for my level. No need to rerun. Appreciate the explanation.
